QF.id: VI Debt Instruments and Government Securities_48

question.text: By when must the depository pay the redemption amount for government securities to clients after RBI makes it available?

answer.text: Before EOD of two days prior to the redemption due date
On the redemption due date itself
Within 5 working days of the redemption due date
Within 30 calendar days of the redemption due date

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The depository pays the redemption amount before the EOD of two days prior to the redemption due date, after the amount has been made available by RBI. **The Trap:** One might expect payment on the redemption date itself, but it's actually two days prior. **Cross-Exam Context:** G-Sec redemption timelines are specific to NISM Series VI. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** G-Sec redemption payment arrives two days before the due date — plan cash flows accordingly.
